codeReview.summary: The fix feature successfully addresses the original Prettier format check failure. The worker executed the exact steps required: ran npm run format to auto-fix all 63 TypeScript files with code style issues, verified the changes with git status, committed the formatted files, and confirmed that npm run format:check now passes. All 264 tests continue to pass after the formatting changes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: services.yaml contains a 'lint' command entry that doesn't exist (npm run lint fails). The actual code style validator is 'format:check'. This was identified as a non-blocking issue in the original scrutiny validation synthesis report and should be corrected to avoid confusion in future validation runs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Original synthesis report (.factory/validation/security/scrutiny/synthesis.json) noted: 'services.yaml references a non-existent 'lint' command. The actual code style validator is 'format:check'. This caused confusion during validation as the initial attempt to run 'npm run lint' failed.'

sharedStateObservations.observation: Project uses Prettier for code formatting with two npm scripts: 'format' (auto-fix) and 'format:check' (verify only). This is the established pattern for code style validation in this project.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: package.json scripts examined during fix: 'format': 'prettier --write "src/**/*.ts"' and 'format:check': 'prettier --check "src/**/*.ts"'. Worker correctly used format:check for verification.

addressesFailureFrom.priorReviewSummary: Round 1 scrutiny validation failed with blocking issue: 'Format check (Prettier) failed: 63 TypeScript files have code style issues. This is a blocking issue that must be fixed before proceeding to feature review.'
addressesFailureFrom.fixAssessment: The fix fully addresses the original failure. All 63 files identified in the format:check failure (agent-empty-output.ts, app-state.ts, app.ts, bash-guard.ts, chat-preferences.ts, coding-delegation.ts, coding-orchestrator.ts, config.ts, cron/adapters.ts, cron/service.ts, cron/types.ts, db.ts, doctor.ts, farm-action-gateway.ts, farm-state-collector.ts, heartbeat-output.ts, heartbeat-policy.ts, home-assistant.ts, index.ts, memory-action-gateway.ts, memory-backend.ts, memory-maintenance.ts, memory-retrieval.ts, memory-search.ts, message-dispatch.ts, onboard-cli.ts, onboarding-completion.ts, parity-config.ts, pi-json-parser.ts, pi-runner.ts, pi-skills.ts, pi-stream-parser.ts, profile-cli.ts, profile.ts, prompt-lifecycle.ts, provider-auth.ts, runtime-config.ts, runtime/boundary-ipc.ts, runtime/host-events.ts, sandbox.ts, singleton-lock.ts, system-prompt.ts, task-schedule.ts, task-scheduler.ts, telegram-attachments.ts, telegram-command-spec.ts, telegram-commands.ts, telegram-format.ts, telegram-streaming.ts, telegram.ts, tui/client.ts, tui/components/custom-editor.ts, tui/components/tool-message.ts, tui/gateway-client.ts, tui/gateway-server.ts, tui/protocol.ts, tui/start.ts, tui/startup-session.ts, tui/theme/theme.ts, verbose-mode.ts, web/control-center-server.ts, whatsapp-auth.ts, workspace-bootstrap.ts) are included in commit b9c89fb which shows exactly 63 files changed. The diff shows only Prettier formatting changes (line breaks, union type formatting, object literal formatting) with no logic modifications. Post-fix verification confirms format:check passes and all 264 tests continue to pass.
evidence: Original failure: npm run format:check exitCode 1 with '63 files have code style issues'
Fix action: npm run format exitCode 0 with '63 files formatted successfully'
Fix verification: npm run format:check exitCode 0 with 'All matched files use Prettier code style!'
Commit b9c89fb shows exactly 63 files changed (3621 insertions, 1233 deletions) matching the 63 files from the original failure
Diff examination confirms only formatting changes (e.g., breaking long lines, reformatting union types, object property alignment) with no functional code changes

summary: PASS: The fix-prettier-issues feature successfully resolves the Round 1 scrutiny validation failure. The worker correctly identified and executed the prescribed fix (npm run format) to address all 63 TypeScript files with Prettier code style issues. Post-fix verification confirms format:check now passes and the full test suite (264 tests) continues to pass. The implementation is complete and follows the expected behavior specified in the feature definition.
